name: What's my case worth if I can't work after warehouse injury in Taylorsville?

mainEntity.name: What's my case worth if I can't work after warehouse injury in Taylorsville?

acceptedAnswer.text: Partial wages + medical; full tort in third-party suit.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Comp pays medical, wage replacement (partial), rehab; third-party for full damages like pain, punitives.[1] Factors: lost wages/commissions, future earning loss.[1] Key factors: prove causation; carrier liens apply. Document finances/doctor limits.[1] Lawyer negotiates max value.

description: Partial wages + medical; full tort in third-party suit.[1]
